scope_summary: Correlate one later FireFlow workflow minute, not the login handoff. Prefer a recent FireFlow action or workflow minute that looks failure-prone, asynchronous, queue-backed, batch-related, approval-related, or configuration-propagation related. Use Apache FireFlow or AFF access clues, aff-boot runtime clues, PostgreSQL clues, and ActiveMQ or broker clues for the same time window. Decide whether the minute stays Apache to aff-boot to PostgreSQL centered or whether broker-side reconnect, queue, or destination activity is strong enough that ActiveMQ should be promoted earlier for that workflow branch. Capture exact timestamps and artifact evidence. Do not mutate appliance state.
